evidence.proof: ALTER TABLE ... ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY present and policy USING (tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant')) covers every tenant table
verifySignature() called before body parse; rejects on mismatch with 401

gaps.capability: Rate limiting on the login endpoint
gaps.why: No limiter wired on POST /auth/login — brute-force is unbounded
Old sessions stay valid after a password reset

weakPoints.item: RLS relies on a session GUC that a superuser connection bypasses
weakPoints.evidence: src/db/rls.sql uses current_setting('app.tenant') which is ignored for BYPASSRLS roles

proposedTasks.title: Wire rate limiter on login endpoint
proposedTasks.detail: Add a per-IP token-bucket limiter to POST /auth/login; reject with 429 over threshold

proposedTasks.title: Revoke sessions on password change
proposedTasks.detail: Invalidate all sessions for a user when their password hash changes
proposedTasks.dependsOn: Wire rate limiter on login endpoint

test_tiers.infra_bound: Postgres-backed RLS tests require a live tenant DB
